tool_purpose: A series of CLIP ConvNeXt-Base (w/ wide embed dim) models trained on subsets LAION-5B using OpenCLIP. The models utilize the timm ConvNeXt-Base model (convnext_base) as the image tower, and the same text tower as the RN50x4 (depth 12, embed dim 640) model from OpenAI CLIP. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Zero-Shot Image Classification. API call: pipeline('image-classification', model='laion/CLIP-convnext_base_w_320-laion_aesthetic-s13B-b82K-augreg').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
